# Code Review Checklist

## Architecture

- Feature First
- No architecture violation
- No module dependency violation

---

## React

- Functional Component
- Hooks
- Composition
- Small Components

---

## TypeScript

- No any
- Strong typing
- Explicit return types

---

## Performance

- No unnecessary render
- Lazy Loading
- Memoization only when needed

---

## Maintainability

- Naming
- Folder structure
- Reusable
- Readable

---

## Security

- No secrets
- No hardcoded URL

---

## Build

npm run lint

npm run typecheck

npm run build

All pass.
